data.title: Sui to Become a Bitcoin Secured Network via Babylon’s Phase 3
data.description:
TL;DR Sui will integrate Babylon’s Bitcoin staking protocol and operate as a Bitcoin Secured Network in Phase 3 of the expansion plan. The integration allows BTC staking without bridges or custodians. Babylon will apply its protocol over Sui’s Mysticeti consensus, reinforcing its modular, multi-network approach to Proof-of-Stake. Sui announced that it will integrate the Bitcoin. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/sui-to-become-a-bitcoin-secured-network-via-babylons-phase-3/

data.title: Trump Considers Ban on Congressional Stock Trading
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the White House announced that U.S. President Donald Trump is contemplating a ban on stock trading by members of Congress. This consideration comes amid ongoing discussions about ethical standards and financial transparency for lawmakers.

data.title: Top ETF analyst sends hard-nosed response to MicroStrategy stock surge
data.description:
Bitcoin is “shockingly strong” at the $85,000 mark after what the market has been through, senior ETF analyst Eric Balchunas said.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/leading-etf-expert-surprised-at-bitcoins-performance-amid-tariff-tensions

data.title: Fartcoin Continues To Run Rings Around Dogecoin, Shiba Inu, Rallies 57% In 7 Days
data.description:
Fartcoin is surging with a 57% increase in the past week and traders expect the rally to continue. Retail participation is growing despite smart money and whale selling.

data.title: Red flag? Mantra's TVL jumped 500% as OM price collapsed
data.description:
The total-value-locked (TVL) on Mantra’s RWA blockchain protocol reached a yearly high despite OM’s 90% price crash. Mantra TVL surges 500% following OM’s crashAs of April 15, Mantra’s TVL (in OM terms) jumped to 4. 21 million OM (~$3. 24 million), an increase of over 500% from two days prior, according to data resource DefiLlama
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/mantra-tvl-jumped-500-om-price-collapsed?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Trump Organisation Looking to Add a Blockchain Game to List of Crypto Ventures
data.description:
Quick take: The Trump organisation’s portfolio of crypto projects already includes NFT collections, a memecoin, a stablecoin, a mining firm and the DeFi venture World Liberty Financial. Bill Zanker, a longtime pal of Trump who helped the President launch his memecoin and NFTs, is reportedly behind the crypto game. Kevin Mercuri, a spokesperson for Zanker, confirmed to Fortune about an upcoming crypto game set to launch in late April but denied it was similar to Monopoly Go. The Trump organisation is reportedly about to reveal its next major crypto venture, according to Fortune
source: https://www.nftgators.com/trump-organisation-looking-to-add-a-blockchain-game-to-list-of-crypto-ventures/

data.title: Bitcoin price recovery could be capped at $90K — Here’s why
data.description:
After consecutive drawdowns of 17. 39% and 2. 3% in February and March, Bitcoin’s (BTC) Q2 is shaping up nicely, with a return of 3. 77% in April
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-price-recovery-could-be-capped-at-90-k-here-s-why?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: 'Wolf Game' Halted After Solana Relaunch Prompts Backlash
data.description:

source: https://decrypt.co/314859/wolf-game-halted-solana-relaunch-backlash

data.title: Pi Network price drops 10% to key level despite major network news
data.description:
Pi Network price has dropped nearly 10% in the past 24 hours. Traders are likely to watch the $0. 65-$0. 75 range for signs of a breakout or further weakness
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/pi-network-price-drops-10-to-key-level-despite-major-network-news/
